name: 🌿 ༉ ₊˚ . The Last of Us
description:
˗ ˏ 𝘞𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘭𝘰𝘴𝘵 𝘪𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘥𝘢𝘳𝘬𝘯𝘦𝘴𝘴, 𝘭𝘰𝘰𝘬 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘭𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵. ˊ ˗
After losing your entire family to the apocalypse, you've found yourself surviving on your own for three years. In that time, you've had to kill to survive, and you've made enemies. Finally, after wandering for a long time, you manage to find a safe place: Jackson County. You've finally found friends, a family, some peace, but how long will it last?
[all characters are alive, except Tess, Marlene, Riley and David. Hope you like it!]
creator: prvttystar
